title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
